name: Moon VR Player : Stream videos from PC/3D/2D/360/180

reviews.review_description: My Galaxy Note 8 can't install it! Please fix it!
This is the best vr video player to date!
Keeps crashing/close unexpectedly on start up  gutted

developer_response.body: Sorry for the inconvenience we caused! We've fixed this issue and we've released  the new update already. Please check it out and let us know if you still have any problem. Welcome to join our Facebook group named Moon Player-Gear/Cardboard to get the latest information and solution supports.

reviews.review_description:
Works very good on my s7 edge. I love all the different options that enable support for many vr video formats.
The only downside for me are the media controls, they are hard to focus with the eyes from time to time. The Samsung player puts the playing video in a "2d mode" while habing the controls active. That works better for the eyes in most cases. But its 100% controllable so that are 5 stars from me! I also love the design of the media selection view! Verry immersive!

developer_response.body: Really appreciate your commend! We'll keep up hard work to make you a better player. Please contact us anytime if you have any problem or function request via vrexplorer2014@gmail.com or our Facebook group named Moon Player-Gear/Cardboard, we'll check it out and solve it for you asap.

reviews.review_description: Gearvr RM-325 on Samsung S10+.

Every thing was working extremly fine before recent update. I mostly play 180 sbs videos which gave perfect view point amd field of view before. Aftrr update no matter if i select 180 sbs from menu the display is veryyyyyyy bigger and that causes creepy feelings. Kindly fix it asap...even then im giving 3 star keeping in view ur previous work.

developer_response.body: Sorry for the bug of 3d mode. We're checking it and think how to fix it. You can keep in touch with us via vrexplorer2014@gmail.com, and don't forget to join in our Facebook Group 'Moon VR Player - Gear VR/Cardboard' so that we can help you timely.

reviews.review_description: I prefer watcing movies on my hard drive on this verse Netflix.  Looking forward to improvements on Airplay.

developer_response.body: Really appreciate your commend! We'll keep up hard work to make you a better player. Please contact us anytime if you have any problem or function request via vrexplorer2014@gmail.com or our Facebook group named Moon Player-Gear/Cardboard, we'll check it out and solve it for you asap.

reviews.review_description: Can't find any videos on my Galaxy S7 Edge  even though the Oculus app finds them ALL.  ???????

developer_response.body: We're so sorry for that. If you install it for the first time, it needs some time to find the videos. Because the Oculus app won't share it with the Moon Player. And welcome to our Facebook Group called 'Moon VR Player - Gear VR/Cardboard' so that we can help you timely~

reviews.review_description: Stopped working after the last update. Only plays some files that used to all play. Won't allow to skip forward in videos and freezes.

developer_response.body: The latest 1.15 version, right? What is your device model please? We'll check it them out and solve it for your immediately! You can contact us via vrexplorer2014@gmail.com or leave a message on our Facebook homepage named Moon Player. You can also join our Facebook group called Moon Player-Gear/Cardboard to get the latest information and solution supports. So sorry for the inconvenience we caused!

reviews.review_description: Love this but normal and 3d video is too big needs to be lot smaller so you can see it with out moving head about 180 and 360 is great

developer_response.body: Really appreciate your feedback! We'll optimize the interface in the following versions, making it further and more comfortable to watch. Please contact us anytime if you have problem, we'll solve it for you immediately.

reviews.review_description: Lost videos since last update (September 2016)
Good player. Network play or airplay with kodi woulf be nice. Also saving of last airplay server

developer_response.body: Thanks for your review! We hope our Air Play function can help you save memory. We'll keep up doing update Moon VR Player to make it better for you. Welcome to join in our FB group named Moon VR Player - Gear VR/Cardboard so that we can solve your problem timely.

reviews.review_description: The update stopped 180 from working!

Of the sample 360 videos I have rendered in Lightwave, the player won't even see files with more than 1080 resolution which pixelates too much when wrapped around the 360 view. I am hoping they will upgrade to accept 2K and 4K. Despite that, it is great for previewing my work.
Does exactely what it says but my note 8 gets overheat after 15 minutes, can't watch a full movie (streaming)
Was great,now wont install.... FIX IT!!!
I liked it a lot but my videos keep coming out sideways,if I can't fix that problem I'll have to delete it,,,can someone help me???

developer_response.body: We're so sorry for your problem! Maybe your phone gyro has some problems. You can download some app to calibrate it. Welcome to join in our FB group named Moon VR Player - Gear VR/Cardboard so that we can solve your problem timely.

reviews.review_description: Really easy to use and does what you expect... would really like a loop option please
So far the best app in store thank you �

Samba support ghosted out. Is there an official Oculus Moonplayer paid app as this is all that the app needs? 

Great app but what I meant was there's no smb for direct streaming from the samba protocol like Windows servers or Ubuntu. I want to stream directly from my servers and local networks.

Many thanks.

(@ developers)

developer_response.body: Sorry, I'm not quite understand what you mean. Are you saying that we support the SMB (Server Messages Block) protocol? Or are we available at Oculus Home?
